Alert.summary: Add PB to Initiative. Swap Initiative with willing ally.

Magic Initiate.summary: Two cantrips + one level-1 spell from Cleric/Druid/Wizard list. Cast L1 spell once/long rest without slot.

Savage Attacker.summary: Once per turn on a weapon hit, reroll the damage dice and use either total.

Skilled.summary: Gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools.

Ability Score Improvement.summary: +2 to one ability or +1 to two abilities (max 20).

Grappler.summary: +1 Str or Dex. Punch + Grab combo on Attack action. Advantage vs creatures you grapple.

Great Weapon Fighting.summary: Treat 1s and 2s on damage dice as 3s for two-handed melee weapons.

Two-Weapon Fighting.summary: Add ability mod to off-hand bonus attack damage.

Boon of Combat Prowess.summary: +1 to any ability (max 30). Once per turn turn a missed attack into a hit.

Boon of Dimensional Travel.summary: +1 to any ability (max 30). After Attack or Magic action, teleport up to 30 ft.

Boon of Fate.summary: +1 to any ability (max 30). Add or subtract 2d4 from a D20 Test within 60 ft.

Boon of Irresistible Offense.summary: +1 to Str or Dex (max 30). Your weapon attacks ignore Resistance.

Boon of the Night Spirit.summary: +1 to any ability (max 30). Stealth + Resistance benefits in dim light or darkness.

Boon of Spell Recall.summary: +1 to any ability (max 30). Recover an expended spell slot 1/long rest.
